args: P='${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}'; if command -v wslpath >/dev/null 2>&1; then P=$(wslpath -u "$P"); fi; bash "$P/.claude/hooks/session-start.sh"
P='${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}'; if command -v wslpath >/dev/null 2>&1; then P=$(wslpath -u "$P"); fi; bash "$P/.claude/hooks/notify.sh"
P='${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}'; if command -v wslpath >/dev/null 2>&1; then P=$(wslpath -u "$P"); fi; bash "$P/.claude/hooks/log-bash.sh"
P='${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}'; if command -v wslpath >/dev/null 2>&1; then P=$(wslpath -u "$P"); fi; bash "$P/.claude/hooks/pre-deploy-guard.sh"
P='${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}'; if command -v wslpath >/dev/null 2>&1; then P=$(wslpath -u "$P"); fi; bash "$P/.claude/hooks/auto-format.sh"
P='${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}'; if command -v wslpath >/dev/null 2>&1; then P=$(wslpath -u "$P"); fi; bash "$P/.claude/hooks/keep-going.sh"
